lodging.name: Historic 1890s Cottage
lodging.desc: Two bedrooms, two bathrooms and three beds. About a 15-minute walk to the beach and walkable to the historic square.
cons: Higher total than a basic hotel

lodging.name: Captain's House on the Lake
lodging.desc: Historic B&B-style lodging on the lake. The Captain's Suite is on the first floor and offers a king-size bed.

lodging.name: Hilton Garden Inn Granbury
lodging.desc: Lakefront hotel option with familiar amenities, easy parking and a more traditional hotel experience.

activities.name: The Long Run: Eagles Tribute
activities.time: Friday, Nov. 13 at 7:30 PM; Saturday, Nov. 14 at 2:00 PM or 7:30 PM
activities.desc: A tribute concert at the Granbury Opera House. Four performances were listed for Nov. 12–14.
activities.notes: All sales shown as final. Best choice for classic rock and a historic theater setting.

activities.name: Walk This Way: Aerosmith Tribute
activities.desc: A high-energy Aerosmith tribute show at Granbury Live.
activities.notes: Great for a louder, more energetic Saturday night.

activities.name: Music, Massage & Merlot
activities.priceLabel: Free admission; wine extra; chair massage $1/minute
activities.desc: Karaoke, wine, music and optional chair massage at D'Vine Wine of Granbury.
activities.notes: Best-value Friday-night option. Come early for a good seat.

activities.name: Craft House Ladies Night
activities.desc: Monthly ladies night with a special craft, drinks, snacks and the full Craft Café menu available.
activities.notes: Confirm the November craft and exact price before booking.

activities.name: Old Fashioned Bingo
activities.desc: Old-fashioned bingo at Brew Drinkery benefiting a different local charity each month.
activities.notes: Confirm that the Nov. 14 event is still scheduled and ask about card prices.

activities.name: Candle Making Class
activities.desc: Create a custom candle by choosing your scent and vessel at Scents of Humor Candle Co.

activities.name: Craft House 12×12 Canvas
activities.desc: Choose a pre-traced design and paint a 12×12 canvas.

activities.name: Craft House 12×16 Canvas
activities.desc: Choose a pre-traced design and paint a 12×16 canvas.

activities.name: Craft House 16×20 Canvas
activities.desc: Choose a pre-traced design and paint a 16×20 canvas.

activities.name: Paint a Tote Bag
activities.desc: Paint a 16×15 cotton tote using paint, stamps or mixed media.

activities.name: Monogram Letter Door Hanger
activities.desc: Design and paint a personalized oval door hanger with your monogram.
activities.notes: Best for a personalized home décor keepsake.

activities.name: Layered Wood Art
activities.desc: Paint and assemble dimensional layered wood art.

activities.name: Dinosaur Valley State Park
activities.desc: See dinosaur tracks in the Paluxy River, hike, take photos and visit the interpretive center.
activities.notes: Track visibility depends on river and weather conditions. Reserve in advance.

activities.name: Fossil Rim Wildlife Center
activities.time: Morning recommended; hours shown beginning at 8:30 AM
activities.desc: Drive-through wildlife experience with giraffes, zebras and other animals.
activities.notes: Advance ticket purchase is recommended. Exact November pricing still needs confirmation.

activities.name: Hood County Farmers Market
activities.desc: Local produce, gifts, soaps, honey and handmade items at 1191 Waters Edge Drive.
activities.notes: Everything is grown, made or produced locally.

activities.name: Historic Square Shopping
activities.desc: Boutiques, antiques, home décor, gifts, clothing and Christmas shopping around the square.
activities.notes: Suggested personal budget: light $25, moderate $50, splurge $100+.

activities.name: Historic Square & Lake Walk
activities.desc: Explore the courthouse square, historic architecture, lakefront, beach and photo spots.
activities.notes: Perfect for an easy, low-cost block of time.

restaurants.name: 1890 Grille & Lounge
restaurants.desc: Upscale dinner on the square. Menu examples found: Texas Trilogy $20 and signature crab cake $25.

restaurants.name: Farina's Winery & Café
restaurants.desc: Italian food, wine and cocktails in a casual girls-lunch or dinner setting.
restaurants.notes: Good option for a relaxed meal near the square.

restaurants.name: La Crêperie in Granbury
restaurants.desc: French café for crêpes, quiche, coffee and brunch. Daytime hours shown Wednesday–Sunday, 10:00 AM–2:30 PM.
restaurants.notes: Friday and Saturday gourmet evenings may require reservations by Thursday at 2:00 PM.

restaurants.name: Coffee, Desserts & Snacks
restaurants.desc: Build in room for coffee, dessert, farmers-market treats and spontaneous stops.
